title: Accessing a two dimensional return value from a function leads to syntax error

features.name: function returning 2D unpacked array type
features.description: Code should include a function that returns a two-dimensional unpacked array type defined via typedef
features.snippet:
typedef byte o_t[1][1];
function o_t f1(input byte i); return '{'{1}}; endfunction

features.name: function call result with immediate multi-dimensional indexing
features.description: Code should include a function call immediately followed by two levels of array indexing like func()[0][0]

features.name: zero-argument function accessed with array indexing without parentheses
features.description: Code should include a function with no arguments accessed like a variable with array indexing but without calling parentheses
